languages.text: "Мы — единственные, кто сохранил праведность на этом куске ксеномерзости!" {n}Злобно сверкнув механическими глазами, Альва-9 разворачивает голову к хищно зашевелившимся ржаволовчим и гремит.{/n} "Протокол 12.60 дробь 9, остановить наведение на цель! Здесь не обошлось без лжи предателя Декабалуса. Он сказал тебе, что мы собираемся утопить платформу, верно? Но сказал ли, почему?"

traits.locale_text: "Мои братья — единственные, кто сохранил праведность на этом куске ксеномерзости!" {n}Злобно сверкнув механическими глазами, Альва-9 разворачивает к голову к тревожно зашевелившимся ржаволовчим.{/n} "Протокол 12.60 дробь 9, остановить наведение! Здесь не обошлось без лжи предателя Декабалуса. Он сказал тебе, что я собираюсь утопить платформу, верно? Но сказал ли, почему?"

languages.text: "We are the only ones who have maintained righteousness on this lump of xenofilth!" {n}Glaring with her mechanical eyes, Alva-9 turns her head toward the Ruststalkers, which are stirring with predatory excitement, and thunders:{/n} "Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting! The lies of the traitor Decabalus are at work here. He told you we planned to sink the platform, correct? But did he tell you why?"
languages.original_text: "Мы — единственные, кто сохранил праведность на этом куске ксеномерзости!" {n}Злобно сверкнув механическими глазами, Альва-9 разворачивает голову к хищно зашевелившимся ржаволовчим и гремит.{/n} "Протокол 12.60 дробь 9, остановить наведение на цель! Здесь не обошлось без лжи предателя Декабалуса. Он сказал тебе, что мы собираемся утопить платформу, верно? Но сказал ли, почему?"

traits.locale_text: "We are the only ones who have maintained righteousness on this lump of xenofilth!" {n}Glaring with her mechanical eyes, Alva-9 turns her head toward the Ruststalkers, which are stirring with predatory excitement, and thunders:{/n} "Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting! The lies of the traitor Decabalus are at work here. He told you we planned to sink the platform, correct? But did he tell you why?"

"We are the only ones who have maintained righteousness on this lump of xenofilth!" {n}Glaring with her mechanical eyes, Alva-9 turns her head toward the Ruststalkers, which are stirring with predatory excitement, and thunders:{/n} "Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting! The lies of the traitor Decabalus are at work here. He told you we planned to sink the platform, correct? But did he tell you why?"

"We are the only ones who have maintained righteousness on this lump of xenofilth!" {n}Glaring with her mechanical eyes, Alva-9 turns her head toward the Ruststalkers, which are stirring with predatory excitement, and thunders:{/n} "Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting! The lies of the traitor Decabalus are at work here. He told you we planned to sink the platform, correct? But did he tell you why?"

languages.text: 「この異星人の汚染された塊の中で、正義を貫き通したのは我々だけだ！」{n}機械的な目で睨みつけるアルバ-9は、捕食本能に興奮した錆びた蔓をじっと見つめ、轟くように言った:{/n}「12.60-9番目の規定、標的を停止せよ！裏切り者デカバルスの嘘がここに働いている。我々がこのプラットフォームを沈めると言った、それは正しいか？しかし、なぜ沈めると言ったのかは伝えたか？」
languages.original_text: "We are the only ones who have maintained righteousness on this lump of xenofilth!" {n}Glaring with her mechanical eyes, Alva-9 turns her head toward the Ruststalkers, which are stirring with predatory excitement, and thunders:{/n} "Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting! The lies of the traitor Decabalus are at work here. He told you we planned to sink the platform, correct? But did he tell you why?"

traits.locale_text: 「この異星人の汚染された塊の中で、正義を貫き通したのは我々だけだ！」{n}機械的な目で睨みつけるアルバ-9は、捕食本能に興奮した錆びた蔓をじっと見つめ、轟くように言った:{/n}「12.60-9番目の規定、標的を停止せよ！裏切り者デカバルスの嘘がここに働いている。我々がこのプラットフォームを沈めると言った、それは正しいか？しかし、なぜ沈めると言ったのかは伝えたか？」

languages.text: «¡Somos los únicos que seguimos siendo justos en este montón de xenoescoria!». {n}Alva-9 lanza una mirada furiosa con sus ojos mecánicos y se gira hacia los ferracechadores, agitados como depredadores ante una presa. Brama:{/n} «Protocolo 12.60 guion 9, ¡cesen el apuntado! Esto es obra de las mentiras del traidor Decabalus. Le dijo que estamos intentando hundir la plataforma, ¿verdad? Pero ¿le ha informado del motivo?».
languages.original_text: "We are the only ones who have maintained righteousness on this lump of xenofilth!" {n}Glaring with her mechanical eyes, Alva-9 turns her head toward the Ruststalkers, which are stirring with predatory excitement, and thunders:{/n} "Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting! The lies of the traitor Decabalus are at work here. He told you we planned to sink the platform, correct? But did he tell you why?"

traits.locale_text: «¡Somos los únicos que seguimos siendo justos en este montón de xenoescoria!». {n}Alva-9 lanza una mirada furiosa con sus ojos mecánicos y se gira hacia los ferracechadores, agitados como depredadores ante una presa. Brama:{/n} «Protocolo 12.60 guion 9, ¡cesen el apuntado! Esto es obra de las mentiras del traidor Decabalus. Le dijo que estamos intentando hundir la plataforma, ¿verdad? Pero ¿le ha informado del motivo?».

languages.text: “在这堆异形污秽之上，只有我们还在坚守正道！”{n}阿尔瓦-9用机械眼怒视，转头看向那些因狩猎刺激而躁动起来的锈色追踪者，雷鸣般喝道：{/n}“12.60-9协议，停止瞄准！叛徒德卡巴洛斯的谎言在作祟。他告诉你们，我们要让平台沉没，对吗？可他告诉你原因了吗？”
languages.original_text: "We are the only ones who have maintained righteousness on this lump of xenofilth!" {n}Glaring with her mechanical eyes, Alva-9 turns her head toward the Ruststalkers, which are stirring with predatory excitement, and thunders:{/n} "Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting! The lies of the traitor Decabalus are at work here. He told you we planned to sink the platform, correct? But did he tell you why?"

traits.locale_text: “在这堆异形污秽之上，只有我们还在坚守正道！”{n}阿尔瓦-9用机械眼怒视，转头看向那些因狩猎刺激而躁动起来的锈色追踪者，雷鸣般喝道：{/n}“12.60-9协议，停止瞄准！叛徒德卡巴洛斯的谎言在作祟。他告诉你们，我们要让平台沉没，对吗？可他告诉你原因了吗？”

languages.text: "Wir sind die Letzten, die auf diesen Felsen voller Xenos für Rechtschaffenheit stehen!" {n}Alva-9 mustert dich mit ihren mechanischen Augen, ehe sie sich den vor räuberischer Aufregung zitternden Rotpirschern zuwendet und brüllt:{/n} "Protokoll 12.60, Strich 9, Zielerfassung einstellen! Hier sind die Lügen des Verräters Decabalus am Werk. Er hat Euch gesagt, Ihr sollt die Plattform zerstören, korrekt? Aber hat er Euch auch den Grund verraten?"
languages.original_text: "We are the only ones who have maintained righteousness on this lump of xenofilth!" {n}Glaring with her mechanical eyes, Alva-9 turns her head toward the Ruststalkers, which are stirring with predatory excitement, and thunders:{/n} "Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting! The lies of the traitor Decabalus are at work here. He told you we planned to sink the platform, correct? But did he tell you why?"

traits.locale_text: "Wir sind die Letzten, die auf diesen Felsen voller Xenos für Rechtschaffenheit stehen!" {n}Alva-9 mustert dich mit ihren mechanischen Augen, ehe sie sich den vor räuberischer Aufregung zitternden Rotpirschern zuwendet und brüllt:{/n} "Protokoll 12.60, Strich 9, Zielerfassung einstellen! Hier sind die Lügen des Verräters Decabalus am Werk. Er hat Euch gesagt, Ihr sollt die Plattform zerstören, korrekt? Aber hat er Euch auch den Grund verraten?"

languages.text: "Bu zeno pisliği yığınında doğruluğu koruyan bir tek biz varız!" {n}Mekanik gözleriyle dik dik bakan Alva-9, yırtıcı bir heyecanla kımıldayan Pasavcısı güruhuna bakıp gürlüyor.{/n} "Protokol 12.60 tire 9, hedeflemeyi durdurun! Burada hain Decabalus'un yalanları işliyor. Size platformu batırmayı planladığımızı söyledi, bu doğru mu? Nedenini söyledi mi?"
languages.original_text: "We are the only ones who have maintained righteousness on this lump of xenofilth!" {n}Glaring with her mechanical eyes, Alva-9 turns her head toward the Ruststalkers, which are stirring with predatory excitement, and thunders:{/n} "Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting! The lies of the traitor Decabalus are at work here. He told you we planned to sink the platform, correct? But did he tell you why?"

traits.locale_text: "Bu zeno pisliği yığınında doğruluğu koruyan bir tek biz varız!" {n}Mekanik gözleriyle dik dik bakan Alva-9, yırtıcı bir heyecanla kımıldayan Pasavcısı güruhuna bakıp gürlüyor.{/n} "Protokol 12.60 tire 9, hedeflemeyi durdurun! Burada hain Decabalus'un yalanları işliyor. Size platformu batırmayı planladığımızı söyledi, bu doğru mu? Nedenini söyledi mi?"

languages.text: « Nous seuls avons préservé notre vertu sur ce tas de xénordures ! » {n}Alva-9 tourne son regard mécanique vers les corrôdeurs, qui s'agitent tels de prédateurs s'apprêtant à partir en chasse, avant de hurler :{/n} « Protocole 12.60 tiret 9, baissez vos armes ! Les mensonges du traître Décabalus sont à l'œuvre. Il vous a dit que nous avions l'intention de couler la plateforme, n'est-ce pas ? Mais vous a-t-il expliqué pourquoi ? »
languages.original_text: "We are the only ones who have maintained righteousness on this lump of xenofilth!" {n}Glaring with her mechanical eyes, Alva-9 turns her head toward the Ruststalkers, which are stirring with predatory excitement, and thunders:{/n} "Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting! The lies of the traitor Decabalus are at work here. He told you we planned to sink the platform, correct? But did he tell you why?"
